{
  "claims": [
    "More than 19,000 small businesses in California have closed due to the Governor’s shutdowns and COVID-19 challenges.",
    "California children experienced a lost academic year in 2020 due to school closures.",
    "The 2021-2022 budget could allocate $26 billion in unexpected revenue to help vulnerable populations in California.",
    "Senate Republicans support dedicating 10% of the state's one-time revenue windfall to assist small businesses forced to close.",
    "Senate Bill 39 aims to reform California’s Employment Development Department (EDD) to reduce obstacles and improve staffing.",
    "Senate Bill 58 is designed to decrease the potential for fraud within the California Employment Development Department."
  ]
}
